text: saw me! Only that’s not called stealing. That’s called extras . After the ’freshments, the grandparents had to go home to their houses. And so I hugged my grandma and grandpa very much. And then I hugged that mean Jim’s grandma too. And also Lucille’s moneybags nanna. “Love your earrings,” I said. Then Mrs. saw me being polite. And she smiled very nice at me. Mrs. has white teeth. They are just like Grampa Miller’s teeth. Only hers don’t come out, I think. Except I’m not for sure positive. And so guess what? I still wish I could hide in her hamper. That’s what.
